entries.target: Special Waste Treatment Plant No. 23, where broken cultivation artifacts are disposed. Li Yao's childhood home. (法宝废墟)
Pineal gland organ linking humans to essence energy. Must reach 100% Spirit Actualization Quotient for awakening. (灵根)
Percentage measure of Spirit Root development. 100% = Spirit Root Awakening. (灵觉率)
Fundamental energy of the cultivation world, drawn from heaven and earth. (灵气)
Computing device powered by cultivation technology. Equivalent to modern computers. (晶脑)
Magical circuit system inscribed on artifacts to give them power. (符阵)
30,000-year period when demon beasts devastated human civilization. Divides Classical and Modern cultivation. (黑暗大时代)
The world/dimension where the story takes place. (天元界)
The nation Li Yao belongs to. Martial culture rooted in cultivation. (星耀联邦)
Federal cultivation city where Li Yao grew up. (浮空城)
City where Grand Desolate War Institution is located, in the Demon Beast Wasteland. (狂浪城)
Top cultivation universities. Includes Deep Sea, Grand Desolate, Star Nebula, Sky Fantasia, etc. (九大名校)
University Li Yao attends. Located in the wasteland, emphasizes combat. (大荒战院)
#1 university for refiners/artificers. Li Yao rejected them. (深海大学)
Cultivation profession specializing in crafting magical equipment. Li Yao's chosen path. (炼器师)
Powered exoskeleton for cultivators. Project Mystic Skeleton aims to mass-produce them. (晶甲)
Project name for mass-production crystal armor at GDWI. (玄骨战甲)
Legendary crafting furnace. Li Yao restored the 1st generation model. (太阿炼器炉)
Demonic energy. Li Yao's body absorbed residual amounts from Ou Yezi. (天魔之力)
Li Yao's nickname after his demonic transformation was revealed. Also means "bad luck star." (妖星)
Li Yao's first original invention. Identifies demon beast species, value, and danger level. (妖兽探测器)
Ancient cultivator guild from 40,000 years ago where Ou Yezi worked. (百炼宗)
Ancient 108-hands forging technique Li Yao learned through Ou Yezi's memories. (混沌疾风锤法)
All-Freshmen interdepartmental competition at Grand Desolate War Institution. (雷霆杯)
VR simulation environment used for exams and training. (大幻境)
Collective term for drugs that enhance physical cultivation. (强身药)
Created 40,000 years ago. Caused Spirit Beasts to evolve into Fiend Beasts, triggering the Great Dark Age. (妖神病毒)
Advanced military weapon. Li Yao helped repair one during the train thunderstorm. (太一雷霆轨道炮)
First cultivation level. Li Yao's current stage. (炼气期)
Second cultivation level. Ding Lingdang's current stage. (筑基期)
Third major cultivation level. (结丹期)
Fourth major cultivation level. Very powerful. (元婴期)
Low-rank demon beast. (妖兵)
Mid-rank demon beast. Li Yao killed one in Verdant Tarn City. (妖将)
High-rank demon beast, equivalent to Core Formation. (妖王)
Mass-production crystal armor project at Grand Desolate. Li Yao's passion project. (玄骨计划)
Massive flying warship used for university recruitment events. (苍穹号)
Fragments of parallel worlds scattered across space. Contain treasures, demons, and ancient inheritances. (秘境)
Cultivator who explores Occult Orbs. Elite profession. (秘境巡察使)
Headquarters of the Occult Orbs Fellowship. Cultivators train and form teams here. (星空城)
Ranking system for Orb Patroller teams. Top 10 get Nascent Soul spiritual seeds. (星辰榜)
People born and raised inside Occult Orbs. Different from regular cultivators. (秘境之子)
Condensed power from Nascent Soul Stage cultivators. Grants temporary massive power boost ("seed explosion"). (灵种)
Temporary state of extreme power when a spiritual seed is activated. (灵种爆发)
Massive volcanic silo weapon that launches star shuttles to distant Occult Orbs. (天炮)
Distant Occult Orb planet. Blue earth, red ocean. Contains ancient underground civilization and Skeleton Dragon. (终极之地)
Ancient demon imprisoned for 30,000 years beneath Ultimacy. Potentially catastrophic if freed. (骸骨龙)
Ancient starship found on Ultimacy. Li Yao becomes its new captain. Can travel between worlds. (星火号)
Elite demon race. Like "Imperial Guards" of the demon civilization. (银血妖族)
Young master of demon infiltration squad. Li Yao's nemesis. (王极)
"The Tenth Star" / "The Sun". Genius refiner from Deep Sea University. Li Yao's rival. (江少阳)
Blood saber that can manipulate blood. Captured by Li Yao during beast tide battle. (红玉迷雾刀)
Demon clan's kill-on-sight list. Li Yao is on it. (灭星榜)
New artifact Li Yao created. Watch-like magical equipment. (闪爪)
Storage ring that holds items in dimensional space. (乾坤戒)
Warship model Li Yao found. Looks like a dragon with erect scales. (死亡之翼)
Legendary racing track for super shuttle racing. Li Yao sets record. (地狱风暴赛道)
Space-based civilization. No inhabitable planets — people live on space stations and starships. (飞星界)
Ragtag crystal suit warrior group Li Yao joins in the Flying Star Sector. (巨角战甲社)
Mass-produced cultivation technique cards. Key technology of the Flying Star Sector. (技能卡)
Online platform for crystal suit battles, trading, and discussion. (晶甲世界)
Secret organization of Immortal Cultivators who exploit ordinary people. Major antagonist faction. (仙人殿)
Cultivators who follow the "immortal" path — selfishly exploiting others for personal power. Opposed to regular cultivators who protect the people. (修仙者)
Primitive world within Flying Star Sector. Qi-trainers live here in six tribes. (铁原)
Iron Plateau's cultivation tradition. Use spiritual gas rather than traditional cultivation methods. (气修)
Ancient parasitic virus that enhances but corrupts its host. Connected to Yan Xibei's corruption. (血纹病毒)
Ancient fighting heritage from Iron Plateau. Fighting IS their purpose. (泰坦战士)
Meteorite-spawned formations that produce demon beasts on Iron Plateau. (末日之卵)
Major refining competition in the Flying Star Sector. Li Yao competed and excelled. (天山论剑)
Edgeless sword Li Yao created at the Skyhill Sword Seminar. (血龙牙)
Major space city in the Flying Star Sector. Li Yao's next destination. (天圣城)
Dangerous space zone known as "Wraiths' Wrath." Great Horn nearly destroyed crossing it. (暗焰带)
